name: Audi A4/A6 Multitronic
reason: Multitronic gearbox risk on older used cars
S line models ride too firmly

name: BMW 3 Series / 5 Series diesel automatic around GBP 6k
reason: Many cheap examples are high mileage and neglected

name: Jaguar XF diesel
reason: Tempting luxury look for the money
Higher repair, electrical, DPF and insurance risk

name: Lexus IS250 / older Lexus GS petrol
reason: But road tax, fuel cost and insurance are usually poor for this budget

name: Honda Accord automatic
reason: But many automatic versions have road tax above GBP 250

name: Citroen C5 / Peugeot 508 automatic
reason: But gearbox, electrical and suspension risks can make 5-year ownership risky
